$comment: Bold (Keynote) — the punch comes from scale, not from more colour (accent still ≤1/slide, lead stays teal). Cover, statement and hero numerals are enlarged so a pitch reads from the back of the room. Only type_scale_pt sizes change; because header capacity is derived from type size, larger titles simply demand shorter copy — validate flags any that overflow.

$template.label: キーノート / Bold
$template.use: 登壇・ピッチ。結論とヒーロー数値を大きく。強調はサイズで作る(色は増やさない)。
